description_long: This is a single rugged work boot, primarily tan in color, with visible signs of heavy use and weathering. The upper is constructed from leather, showing creases, scuffs, and areas of discoloration, especially around the toe and sides. The boot features a padded collar, metal eyelets, and a standard criss-cross lacing system with long, frayed laces. The tongue displays a prominent rectangular brand patch with red and blue text, partially obscured by dirt. The sole is thick and robust, designed for durability, with a lugged tread pattern for traction, though the tread detail is not fully visible. The overall appearance suggests this boot has been used extensively in outdoor or industrial environments.
description: A heavily worn tan leather work boot with a padded collar, criss-cross laces, and a visible brand patch on the tongue. The boot shows significant scuffing, dirt, and creasing, indicating extensive use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toe box, laces, and the brand patch on the tongue, with visible dirt and scuff marks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the creased leather, padded collar, and the thick, worn sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded collar, heel structure, and the back seam of the boot.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the lacing system, side creases, and the overall worn condition of the boot.
attribute_logo: Rectangular patch on the tongue, red and blue text on a gray background
